case_title: CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS LECUE, MARIO

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,661.30 FILED BY CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR AS TO DEFENDANT LECUE, MARIO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-20-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-20-2001, OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-02-2001 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LECUE, MARIO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO OFFICE OF THE TREASURER & TAX COLLECTOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LECUE, MARIO $2,661.30 PRINCIPAL, $41.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,702.30 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO MARIO LECUE RETURNED--FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED
PER COMM. MURRAY, IT IS HEREBY ORDERED THAT THE JUDGMENT RENDERED 8/2/01 AGAINST MARIO LECUE BE VACATED. DISMISSAL TO BE ENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT LECUE, MARIO PER ORDER OF COMM, JUDGMENT RENDERED AUG. 2, 2001 AGAINST MARIO LECUE BE VACATED. DEFENDANT WAS A MINOR AT THE TIME OF THE MEDICAL SERVICES RENDERED AND IS THEREFORE NOT LIABLE. DISMISSAL TO BE ENTERED NUNC PRO TUNC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT SENT TO MARIO LECUE RETURNED--FORWARDING ORDER EXPIRED
